title: December 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 29''' is the 363rd day of the year (364th in leap years), with 2 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1972]] – [[Jude Law]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Diego Luna]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 80|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 80]] published.
*[[1991]] – [[Brian Vernel]] is born.
*[[2004]] – [[Republic 72|''Republic'' 72]] published.
*2004 – [[Empire 28|''Empire'' 28]] published.
*2004 – [[Obsession 2|''Obsession'' 2]] published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Infinities]]'' published.
*2015 – [[LEGO Star Wars: A New Hope (Scholastic)|''LEGO Star Wars: A New Hope'']] published.
*2015 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Droid Tales Episodes I-III]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Jim Baikie]] dies.
*[[2019]] – "[[Breakout]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – [[Bounty Hunters 19|''Bounty Hunters'' 19]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 13|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 13]] published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett]]'' premiered on Disney+ with "[[Chapter 1: Stranger in a Strange Land]]."
<noinclude>
